option.name: originalContent
option.value:
2026 Week 11 Period: From 9-Mar-2026 to 15-Mar-2026 Projects & enhancements Ongoing projects & priorities MR Failures POC Techstack: AppSmith, AGGrid & AMCharts Database: Postgres CPU/Memory Anomaly detection & Predictive Maintenance AI application. UI in React, Typescript Framework: PyOD, SCIKIT, PyTorch, Math Finalized Framework: PyOD + Math Data: Log Analyzer PerfLab Programming language: Python WebUI version diff application using ApiTable, NocoDB DevBuild None CATT impact metric creation. Automation of Sonar performance analysis. Artifact analyzer application On hold Quick glance at week Snapshot [Screenshots to be updated] Productivity impact analysis and solution Flaky tests and JIRAs allocated with random labels New Cucumber flaky confluence doc - https://adenza.atlassian.net/l/cp/A1f96k1G Total Suspected Flaky test Found - 1 - Cucumber flaky test - 0 - Frontend test - 0 - Tests retried - 0 - Flaky tests on external repo and v17 - 0 - new flaky test in release - 1 Open: None updated: None In-Progress(Push review in progress): None Previous Week: None Under Observation: None Closed: None On-hold: https://jira.calypso.com/browse/CAL-435189 This issue is blocked by CSRI-536. Gradle daemon disappeared and out of memory adjustments This week: Updated: None Previous weeks: None Open: Under-observation: None In-Progress: None Resolved/Closed: None | Date | Category | Issue | Branches with failure count | Current status | URL | RCA | JIRA issue | |------|----------|-------|-----------------------------|----------------|-----|-----|------------| | 2026-03-15 | PLATFORM | Gradle build daemon disappeared(407) | Repos:
1. calypso-catt-automation 396
2. release 10
3. cbsl 1

http://hfserver.calypso.nasdaq.com/jenkins/job/mr18-bugs-fcf-capl-e2eCommitStage/323 | 1. [Validation Warning - field [foundExceptions], class [com.calypso.cloud.compliance.model.RuleResultSpec], message: "javadoc is missing", APLBackTestingResponse getBackTestingData(APLBackTestingRequest request) throws CalypsoServiceException; | | Broken branches and modules mr18-bugs(527 cases) e2e- 415, unit test- 97, installer- 2 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> Tests failed 195: RCA -> Start application failed 48: RCA -> Sonar Quality Gate issue 42: RCA -> Discovery Server Failed to Start 34: RCA -> Compilation failed 32: RCA -> Build Timeout 28: RCA -> Cannot find symbol 27: RCA -> E2E installer not found 21: RCA -> Module Connectivity Issue 20: RCA -> Shell script Issue 17: RCA -> Modules: datauploader, deliver, devopscenter, docker, docker-2, erscomplianceserver, installer, installer-2, liquidity, mktdatainterfaces, prodsuite, prodsuite-docker, scheduling-engine, sonar are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green FEATURE-ORACLE23-REL-47456-0426-19(141 cases) e2e- 140, unit test- 1, installer- 0 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> File Not Found 108 Execution failed for Gradle Task 16 Tests failed 9 Shell script Issue 3 No identified problem 2 Sonar Quality Gate issue 1 Gradle build daemon disappeared 1 E2E installer not found 1 Modules: devopscenter, dock-bo, dock-bo-leg, dock-fo, dock-fo-leg, dock-mo, dock-mo-leg, dock-shared, dock-shared-leg, middleoffice_risk, prodsuite, prodsuite-docker, shrdsrvc-gql, sonar are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green FEATURE-FO-IRD-MODERNIZATION-0226-19(134 cases) e2e- 130, unit test- 0, installer- 4 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> Start application failed 32 Shared Services startup failed 18 Authentication Server Issue 11 DataServer Failed to Start 10 File Not Found 9 Execution failed for Gradle Task 8 Connection to Oracle failed 8 Cannot find symbol 8 E2E installer not found 7 Module Connectivity Issue 6 Modules: datauploader, devbuild-cross, devbuild-mo, devopscenter, dock-bo, dock-bo-leg, dock-fo, dock-fo-leg, dock-mo, dock-mo-leg, dock-shared, dock-shared-leg, erscomplianceserver, fi, fx, fxweb-test, installer, interestrates, liquidity, middleoffice_risk, pre-e2ebuild, prodsuite, prodsuite-docker, rate-products, rate-products-test, shrdsrvc-gql, smoke-bo, smoke-bo-leg, smoke-fo, smoke-mo, smoke-mo-leg, smoke-shared, smoke-shared-leg are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green FEATURE-FO-FOWS_FX_MODERNIZATION2-0626-19(131 cases) e2e- 104, unit test- 20, installer- 7 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> Compilation failed 85 Tests failed 24 Sonar Quality Gate issue 4 Package x.y.z does not exist 4 Killed Job 3 Cypress test failure 3 Missing dependency 2 Execution failed for Gradle Task 2 E2E installer not found 2 Unable to connect to database 1 Modules: asciidoctor, calib, checkmarx, cptyintel, devopscenter, dock-bo, dock-bo-leg, dock-fo, dock-fo-leg, dock-mo, dock-mo-leg, dock-shared, dock-shared-leg, fi, fxweb-test, interestrates, middleoffice_risk, prodsuite, prodsuite-docker, property-conversion, reporting, shrdsrvc-gql, smoke-bo, smoke-bo-leg, smoke-fo, smoke-fo-leg, smoke-mo, smoke-mo-leg, smoke-shared, smoke-shared-leg, sonar are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green CORE-PLATFORM_19(130 cases) e2e- 87, unit test- 37, installer- 0 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> Start application failed 25: RCA -> Module Connectivity Issue 20: RCA -> Tests failed 19: RCA -> Sonar Quality Gate issue 14: RCA -> Missing dependency 10: RCA -> Artifact Server Issue 9: RCA -> Rebase Failure Due to Conflict 8: RCA -> Jar Version Conflict 7: RCA -> DNS failure 5: RCA -> Deliver is missing success tags 5: RCA -> Modules: deliver, interestrates, scheduling-engine, sonar are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green CORE-BACKOFFICE_19(84 = 80 + 4 merge cases) e2e- 40, unit test- 40, installer- 0 Failure reasons: Test failures due to -> Sonar Quality Gate issue 26: RCA -> Tests failed 17: RCA -> Shell script Issue 10: RCA -> E2E installer not found 8: RCA -> Deliver is missing success tags 4: RCA -> Gradle build daemon disappeared 4: RCA -> Compilation failed 4: RCA -> Execution failed for task ':modules:calypso-collateral:compileJava'. Event Server Failure 3 File Not Found 2 Cannot find symbol 2 Modules: deliver, scheduling-engine, sonar are still failing/unstable All other modules are now fixed/green New regular expressions, and adaptation of Jenkins dashboard to exclude quality failure New: None Under observation: None Open: None Closed: https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47832 https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47833 https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47834 https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47835 https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47836 https://calypso-jira.atlassian.net/browse/REL-47837 Infrastructure issues None Automations failing NA Nasdaq Integration Support Nasdaq Laptop migration Status APLs: APL-16615: DXE: AI Predictive Maintenance Open APL-13576: DXE AI CPU/Memory anomaly detection In Progress APL-13574: DXE DevTools Enhancements for Nasdaq and Gradle 7 Open APL-13575: DXE Tools for CodeWithMe/CodeTogether Open APL-13579: DXE Rancher Desktop challenges on Laptops Dev Complete APL-13580: DXE Champions testing for network revamping Open APL-13577: DXE WebUI playwright tests and packaging Open APL-13578: DXE Sonar rules enhancements and performance Open APL-10881: DXE : AI Open Rewrite Open APL-10380: DXE Artifact analyzer Web UI Canceled APL-13707: DXE BAU Applications maintenance Open APL-13708: DXE BAU Incident management In Progress Preview APL-13709: DXE BAU Devbuild support Open APL-13710: DXE BAU Java 21 support Open Other tasks: None BAU: CPU/Memory utilization fixes. Responding to user issues related to live applications like CI-Alert. Weekly Jenkins report analysis and notifying branch owners if there is any issue. Jenkins Dashboard updates on daily basis. Shared colopI60 box memory observation and cleanup. Confluence/Box updates: None Trainings and learnings: None

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
2026 Week 11 Period: From 9-Mar-2026 to 15-Mar-2026 Projects & enhancements Ongoing projects & priorities MR Failures POC Techstack: AppSmith, AGGrid & AMCharts Database: Postgres CPU/Memory Anomaly detection & Predictive Maintenance AI application. UI in React, Typescript Framework: PyOD, SCIKIT, PyTorch, Math Finalized Framework: PyOD + Math Data: Log Analyzer PerfLab Programming language: Python WebUI version diff application using ApiTable, NocoDB DevBuild None CATT impact metric creation. Automation of Sonar performance analysis. Artifact analyzer application On hold Quick glance at week Total builds(DB) - 22087 Failure count (DB)- 4307 (core-823 , others - 3484) Jenkins KPI: Success: 91.80%, Failure: 8.20% (Unstable: 3.43%, Quality: 4.02%, Platform: 0.40%, Aborted: 0.35%) All Core, Promotion, Release (failures count per branch) Core, Promotion, Release (count by failure reason) [Screenshots to be updated] Productivity impact analysis and solution Flaky tests and JIRAs allocated with random labels New Cucumber flaky confluence doc - https://adenza.atlassian.net/l/cp/A1f96k1G Total Suspected Flaky test Found - 1 Cucumber flaky test - 0 Frontend test - 0 Tests retried - 0 Flaky tests on external repo and v17 - 0 new flaky test in release - 1 Open: None updated: None In-Progress(Push review in progress): None Previous Week: None Under Observation: None Closed: None On-hold: https://jira.calypso.com/browse/CAL-435189 This issue is blocked by CSRI-536.
